cycle.description: Cycle on which the right can be realized.

level.description: Level at which a block must be baked or an attestation must be sent.

timestamp.description: Time (estimated, in case of future rights) when a block must be baked or an attestation must be sent.

round.description:
Round (0 - ∞) at which the baker can propose/produce a block.
If a baker at round  `0` doesn't produce a block within the given time interval, then the right goes to a baker at round` 1`, etc.
For `attestation` rights this field is always `null`.

slots.description: Number of slots to be attested. For `baking` rights this field is always `null`.

baker.description: Baker to which baking or attestation right has been given.
